column1: I look forward to hearing from you, and possibly meeting with you.
I am grateful for the opportunity to receive your consideration for the [position] position.
I truly appreciate your time and consideration regarding this vital role in your organisation.
I appreciate your time and look forward to future correspondence that would allow me to gain further insight into your expectations.
Thanks so much for your time, and I look forward to hearing from you.
I am eager to learn more about the [position] position you have available and am happy to answer any follow-up questions you may have at your convenience.
I welcome the chance to speak with you about my qualifications and the specifics of the job.
I am available to meet with you for an interview at your convenience.
I look forward to any further correspondence with you and thank you for your time and consideration.
I looking forward to proceeding further through the hiring process and becoming a trusted member of your team.
I thank you for your time and attention in considering me for this position.
